revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:1960年代の戯曲]] [[ar:Category:مسرحيات في عقد 1960]] [[bn:Category:১৯৬০-এর দশকের নাটক]] [[commons:Category:1960s plays]] [[cy:Category:Dramâu'r 1960au]] [[es:Category:Obras de teatro de los años 1960]] [[fa:Category:نمایشنامه‌های دهه ۱۹۶۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Pièce de théâtre des années 1960]] [[he:Category:מחזות משנות ה-1960]] [[ko:Category:1960년대 희곡]] [[pt:Category:Peças de teatro da década de 1960]] [[ro:Category:Piese din anii 1960]] [[ru:Category:Пьесы 1960-х годов]] [[sh:Category:Drame 1960-ih]] [[simple:Category:1960s plays]] [[tr:Category:1960'larda tiyatro oyunları]] [[zh:Category:1960年代戲劇]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Chinsetsu yumiharizuki]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6287808)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
